Terraform will perform the following actions:

  # module.foo.terraform_data.validation will be created
  + resource "terraform_data" "validation" {
      + id = (known after apply)
    }

  # module.foo.aws_s3_bucket.old will be destroyed
  - resource "aws_s3_bucket" "old" {
      - bucket = "old-bucket" -> null
    }

  # aws_db_instance.main must be replaced
-/+ resource "aws_db_instance" "main" {
      ~ identifier     = "db-old" -> "db-new"
      ~ engine_version = "13" -> "16"
    }

Plan includes drift, sensitive values, import metadata, and output changes for TFP2 coverage.
